content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run a Quality / QA-QC discovery session for your supplement product.
Women's beauty collagen capsules — 21 CFR Part 111 cGMP, targeting NSF Certified for Sport.
Identity (FTIR/HPLC), assay per label claim, micro (USP <2021>/<2022>), heavy metals (USP <232>/<233>), disintegration.
Real-time and accelerated (40°C/75% RH) for 24 months. Assay, micro, appearance, disintegration at each timepoint.
CoA, allergen declaration, heavy metals cert, BSE/TSE declaration. Audit every 2 years. Supplier is FSSC 22000 certified.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
